HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering
 
Loading...
Searching...
No Matches
SingCancellation.cpp
Go to the documentation of this file.
1
5
6#include "SingCancellation.h"
7
8// Construct and immediately build the paired quadrature.
9SingCancellation::SingCancellation(int commonNodes, Triangle* tPtr1, Triangle* tPtr2,
10 int nQuadrature, double(*xQuadrature)[2], double* wQuadrature)
11 : commonNodes(commonNodes), tPtr1(tPtr1), tPtr2(tPtr2), nQuadrature(nQuadrature),
12 xQuadrature(xQuadrature), wQuadrature(wQuadrature) {
13 if (commonNodes == 1) commonVertex();
14 else if (commonNodes == 2) commonEdge();
15 else if (commonNodes == 3) commonFacet();
16 else {
17 throw std::invalid_argument("commonNodes must be 1, 2, or 3.");
18 }
19 }
20
21// Trivial destructor.
22SingCancellation::~SingCancellation() { }
23
38void SingCancellation::commonVertex() {
39 int size = nQuadrature * nQuadrature * nQuadrature * nQuadrature; // number of raw 4D points
40
41 // allocate working arrays:
42 // xi1, xi2 : size x 2 (1 + 1 symmetric)
43 // eta1,eta2 : size x 2
44 // jac, weights : size
45 std::vector<std::vector<double>> xi1(size, std::vector<double>(2));
46 std::vector<std::vector<double>> xi2(size, std::vector<double>(2));
47 std::vector<std::vector<double>> eta1(size, std::vector<double>(2));
48 std::vector<std::vector<double>> eta2(size, std::vector<double>(2));
49 std::vector<double> jac(size), weights(size);
50
51 // Build the raw tensor-product nodes/weights
52 for(int i = 0, idx = 0; i < nQuadrature; ++i) {
53 for(int j = 0; j < nQuadrature; ++j) {
54 for(int p = 0; p < nQuadrature; ++p) {
55 for(int q = 0; q < nQuadrature; ++q, ++idx) {
56 xi1[idx][0] = xQuadrature[q][0];
57 xi2[idx][0] = xQuadrature[q][0] * xQuadrature[p][0];
58 eta1[idx][0] = xQuadrature[q][0] * xQuadrature[j][0];
59 eta2[idx][0] = xQuadrature[q][0] * xQuadrature[j][0] * xQuadrature[i][0];
60
61 // Combined Jacobian for the nested maps
62 jac[idx] = xQuadrature[j][0] * xQuadrature[q][0] * xQuadrature[q][0] * xQuadrature[q][0];
63
64 // 4D tensor-product weight
65 weights[idx] = wQuadrature[q] * wQuadrature[p] * wQuadrature[j] * wQuadrature[i];
66 }
67 }
68 }
69 }
70
71 for(int i = 0; i < size; ++i)
72 {
73 // --- symmetrize: append (ξ->η, η->ξ) to get 12 total
74 // 1st half of sym: η <- ξ
75 eta1[i][1] = xi1[i][0];
76 eta2[i][1] = xi2[i][0];
77 // 2nd half: ξ <- η
78 xi1[i][1] = eta1[i][0];
79 xi2[i][1] = eta2[i][0];
80 }
81
82 // Output arrays
83 pointsMap1.assign( 2 * size, std::vector<double>( 3, 0.0 ) );
84 pointsMap2.assign( 2 * size, std::vector<double>( 3, 0.0 ) );
85 w.resize(2 * size);
86
87 // Determine alignment/permutation on each triangle
88 std::pair<int,int> commonVertex = tPtr1->FindCommonVertexIndices(tPtr2);
89 if (commonVertex.first == 0 && commonVertex.second == 0) {
90 throw std::runtime_error("No common vertex found between the triangles.");
91 }
92 std::vector<int> perm1 = this->getPermutation(commonVertex.first);
93 std::vector<int> perm2 = this->getPermutation(commonVertex.second);
94
95 // Fill paired barycentric nodes and weights
96 for(int i = 0; i < size; ++i) {
97 for(int k = 0; k < 2; ++k) {
98 int j = k * size + i; // index in the 1D vector
99 pointsMap1[j][perm1[0]] = 1.0 - xi1[i][k];
100 pointsMap1[j][perm1[1]] = xi1[i][k] - xi2[i][k];
101 pointsMap1[j][perm1[2]] = xi2[i][k];
102 pointsMap2[j][perm2[0]] = 1.0 - eta1[i][k];
103 pointsMap2[j][perm2[1]] = eta1[i][k] - eta2[i][k];
104 pointsMap2[j][perm2[2]] = eta2[i][k];
105 w[j] = 4.0 * weights[i] * jac[i];
106 }
107 }
108#ifdef DEBUG
109 // Write out five MATLAB-formatted .txt files:
110 writeMatlabMatrixToTxt("x1.txt", "x1_cpp", "x", pointsMap1, 2 * size, 6);
111 writeMatlabMatrixToTxt("y1.txt", "y1_cpp", "y", pointsMap1, 2 * size, 6);
112 writeMatlabMatrixToTxt("z1.txt", "z1_cpp", "z", pointsMap1, 2 * size, 6);
113 writeMatlabMatrixToTxt("x2.txt", "x2_cpp", "x", pointsMap2, 2 * size, 6);
114 writeMatlabMatrixToTxt("y2.txt", "y2_cpp", "y", pointsMap2, 2 * size, 6);
115 writeMatlabMatrixToTxt("z2.txt", "z2_cpp", "z", pointsMap2, 2 * size, 6);
116 writeMatlabVectorToTxt("w.txt", "w_cpp", w, 6);
117#endif
118}
119
128void SingCancellation::commonEdge() {
129 int size = nQuadrature * nQuadrature * nQuadrature * nQuadrature; // number of raw 4D points
130
131 // build the raw 4-D tensor product grid of (ω, x1, x2, χ1) and weights
132 std::vector<double> omega(size), x1(size), x2(size), chi1(size), weights(size);
133 for(int i = 0, idx = 0; i < nQuadrature; ++i) {
134 for(int j = 0; j < nQuadrature; ++j) {
135 for(int p = 0; p < nQuadrature; ++p) {
136 for(int q = 0; q < nQuadrature; ++q, ++idx) {
137 omega[idx] = xQuadrature[q][0];
138 x1[idx] = xQuadrature[p][0];
139 x2[idx] = xQuadrature[j][0];
140 chi1[idx] = xQuadrature[i][0];
141 weights[idx] = wQuadrature[q] * wQuadrature[p] * wQuadrature[j] * wQuadrature[i];
142 }
143 }
144 }
145 }
146
147 // allocate working arrays:
148 // mu1, mu2 : size x 6
149 // xi1, xi2 : size x 12 (6 + 6 symmetric)
150 // eta1,eta2 : size x 12
151 // jac : size
152 std::vector<std::vector<double>> mu1(size, std::vector<double>(6));
153 std::vector<std::vector<double>> mu2(size, std::vector<double>(6));
154 std::vector<std::vector<double>> xi1(size, std::vector<double>(12));
155 std::vector<std::vector<double>> xi2(size, std::vector<double>(12));
156 std::vector<std::vector<double>> eta1(size, std::vector<double>(12));
157 std::vector<std::vector<double>> eta2(size, std::vector<double>(12));
158 std::vector<double> jac(size);
159 for (int i = 0; i < size; ++i) {
160 // 6 base cases (k = 0..5)
161 mu1[i][0] = - omega[i] * x1[i];
162 mu2[i][0] = - omega[i] * x1[i] * x2[i];
163 xi1[i][0] = ( 1.0 - omega[i] ) * chi1[i] + omega[i];
164 xi2[i][0] = omega[i] * ( 1.0 - x1[i] + x1[i] * x2[i] );
165
166 mu1[i][1] = omega[i] * x1[i];
167 mu2[i][1] = omega[i] * x1[i] * x2[i];
168 xi1[i][1] = ( 1.0 - omega[i] ) * chi1[i] + omega[i] * ( 1.0 - x1[i] );
169 xi2[i][1] = omega[i] * ( 1.0 - x1[i] );
170
171 mu1[i][2] = - omega[i] * x1[i] * x2[i];
172 mu2[i][2] = omega[i] * x1[i] * ( 1.0 - x2[i] );
173 xi1[i][2] = ( 1.0 - omega[i] ) * chi1[i] + omega[i];
174 xi2[i][2] = omega[i] * ( 1.0 - x1[i] );
175
176 mu1[i][3] = omega[i] * x1[i] * x2[i];
177 mu2[i][3] = omega[i] * x1[i] * ( x2[i] - 1.0 );
178 xi1[i][3] = ( 1.0 - omega[i] ) * chi1[i] + omega[i] * ( 1.0 - x1[i] * x2[i] );
179 xi2[i][3] = omega[i] * ( 1.0 - x1[i] * x2[i] );
180
181 mu1[i][4] = - omega[i] * x1[i] * x2[i];
182 mu2[i][4] = - omega[i] * x1[i];
183 xi1[i][4] = ( 1.0 - omega[i] ) * chi1[i] + omega[i];
184 xi2[i][4] = omega[i];
185
186 mu1[i][5] = omega[i] * x1[i] * x2[i];
187 mu2[i][5] = omega[i] * x1[i];
188 xi1[i][5] = ( 1.0 - omega[i] ) * chi1[i] + omega[i] * ( 1.0 - x1[i] * x2[i] );
189 xi2[i][5] = omega[i] * ( 1.0 - x1[i] );
190
191 jac[i] = x1[i] * omega[i] * omega[i] * ( 1.0 - omega[i] );
192
193 for(int k = 0; k < 6; ++k)
194 {
195 // --- compute η = μ + ξ for the 6 cases
196 eta1[i][k] = mu1[i][k] + xi1[i][k];
197 eta2[i][k] = mu2[i][k] + xi2[i][k];
198
199 // --- symmetrize: append (ξ->η, η->ξ) to get 12 total
200 // 1st half of sym: η <- ξ
201 eta1[i][k + 6] = xi1[i][k];
202 eta2[i][k + 6] = xi2[i][k];
203 // 2nd half: ξ <- η
204 xi1[i][k + 6] = eta1[i][k];
205 xi2[i][k + 6] = eta2[i][k];
206 }
207 }
208
209 pointsMap1.assign( 12 * size, std::vector<double>( 3, 0.0 ) );
210 pointsMap2.assign( 12 * size, std::vector<double>( 3, 0.0 ) );
211 w.resize(12 * size);
212
213 // Determine the shared edge and permutations
214 std::pair<int,int> commonEdges = tPtr1->FindCommonEdgeIndices(tPtr2);
215 if (commonEdges.first == 0 && commonEdges.second == 0) {
216 throw std::runtime_error("No common edge found between the triangles.");
217 }
218 std::vector<int> perm1 = this->getPermutation(commonEdges.first);
219 std::vector<int> perm2 = this->getPermutation(commonEdges.second);
220
221 // Fill the points and weights for both maps
222 for(int i = 0; i < size; ++i) {
223 for(int k = 0; k < 12; ++k) {
224 int j = k * size + i; // index in the 1D vector
225 pointsMap1[j][perm1[0]] = 1.0 - xi1[i][k];
226 pointsMap1[j][perm1[1]] = xi1[i][k] - xi2[i][k];
227 pointsMap1[j][perm1[2]] = xi2[i][k];
228 pointsMap2[j][perm2[0]] = 1.0 - eta1[i][k];
229 pointsMap2[j][perm2[1]] = eta1[i][k] - eta2[i][k];
230 pointsMap2[j][perm2[2]] = eta2[i][k];
231 w[j] = 0.5 * (4.0 * weights[i] * jac[i]); // factor 1/2 from mapping
232 }
233 }
234#ifdef DEBUG
235 // Write out five MATLAB-formatted .txt files:
236 writeMatlabMatrixToTxt("x1.txt", "x1_cpp", "x", pointsMap1, 12 * size, 6);
237 writeMatlabMatrixToTxt("y1.txt", "y1_cpp", "y", pointsMap1, 12 * size, 6);
238 writeMatlabMatrixToTxt("z1.txt", "z1_cpp", "z", pointsMap1, 12 * size, 6);
239 writeMatlabMatrixToTxt("x2.txt", "x2_cpp", "x", pointsMap2, 12 * size, 6);
240 writeMatlabMatrixToTxt("y2.txt", "y2_cpp", "y", pointsMap2, 12 * size, 6);
241 writeMatlabMatrixToTxt("z2.txt", "z2_cpp", "z", pointsMap2, 12 * size, 6);
242 writeMatlabVectorToTxt("w.txt", "w_cpp", w, 6);
243#endif
244}
245
252void SingCancellation::commonFacet() {
253 int size = nQuadrature * nQuadrature * nQuadrature * nQuadrature; // number of raw 4D points
254
255 // build the raw 4-D tensor product grid of (ω, x1, x2, χ1) and weights
256 std::vector<double> omega(size), x(size), chi1(size), chi2(size), weights(size);
257 for(int i = 0, idx = 0; i < nQuadrature; ++i) {
258 for(int j = 0; j < nQuadrature; ++j) {
259 for(int p = 0; p < nQuadrature; ++p) {
260 for(int q = 0; q < nQuadrature; ++q, ++idx) {
261 omega[idx] = xQuadrature[q][0];
262 x[idx] = xQuadrature[p][0];
263 chi1[idx] = xQuadrature[j][0];
264 chi2[idx] = xQuadrature[i][0];
265 weights[idx] = wQuadrature[q] * wQuadrature[p] * wQuadrature[j] * wQuadrature[i];
266 }
267 }
268 }
269 }
270
271 // allocate working arrays:
272 // mu1, mu2 : size x 3
273 // xi1, xi2 : size x 6 (3 + 3 symmetric)
274 // eta1,eta2 : size x 6
275 // jac : size x 6
276 std::vector<std::vector<double>> mu1(size, std::vector<double>(3));
277 std::vector<std::vector<double>> mu2(size, std::vector<double>(3));
278 std::vector<std::vector<double>> xi1(size, std::vector<double>(6));
279 std::vector<std::vector<double>> xi2(size, std::vector<double>(6));
280 std::vector<std::vector<double>> eta1(size, std::vector<double>(6));
281 std::vector<std::vector<double>> eta2(size, std::vector<double>(6));
282 std::vector<std::vector<double>> jac(size, std::vector<double>(6));
283
284 for (int i = 0; i < size; ++i) {
285 // k = 0
286 mu1[i][0] = omega[i];
287 mu2[i][0] = omega[i] * x[i];
288 xi1[i][0] = ( 1.0 - mu1[i][0] ) * chi1[i];
289 xi2[i][0] = xi1[i][0] * chi2[i];
290 jac[i][0] = omega[i] * ( 1.0 - mu1[i][0] ) * xi1[i][0];
291
292 // k = 1
293 mu1[i][1] = omega[i] * x[i];
294 mu2[i][1] = omega[i] * ( x[i] - 1.0 );
295 xi1[i][1] = ( 1.0 - mu1[i][1] + mu2[i][1] ) * chi1[i] - mu2[i][1];
296 xi2[i][1] = ( xi1[i][1] + mu2[i][1] ) * chi2[i] - mu2[i][1];
297 jac[i][1] = omega[i] * ( 1.0 - mu1[i][1] + mu2[i][1] ) * ( xi1[i][1] + mu2[i][1] );
298
299 // k = 2
300 mu1[i][2] = omega[i] * x[i];
301 mu2[i][2] = omega[i];
302 xi1[i][2] = ( 1.0 - mu2[i][2] ) * chi1[i] + mu2[i][2] - mu1[i][2];
303 xi2[i][2] = ( xi1[i][2] - mu2[i][2] + mu1[i][2] ) * chi2[i];
304 jac[i][2] = omega[i] * ( 1.0 - mu2[i][2] ) * ( xi1[i][2] - mu2[i][2] + mu1[i][2] );
305
306 for(int k = 0; k < 3; ++k)
307 {
308 // --- compute η = μ + ξ for the 3 cases
309 eta1[i][k] = mu1[i][k] + xi1[i][k];
310 eta2[i][k] = mu2[i][k] + xi2[i][k];
311
312 // --- symmetrize: append (ξ->η, η->ξ) to get 12 total
313 // 1st half of sym: η <- ξ
314 eta1[i][k + 3] = xi1[i][k];
315 eta2[i][k + 3] = xi2[i][k];
316 // 2nd half: ξ <- η
317 xi1[i][k + 3] = eta1[i][k];
318 xi2[i][k + 3] = eta2[i][k];
319 }
320 }
321
322 pointsMap1.assign( 6 * size, std::vector<double>( 3, 0.0 ) );
323 pointsMap2.assign( 6 * size, std::vector<double>( 3, 0.0 ) );
324 w.resize(6 * size);
325
326 // Fill paired nodes and weights
327 for(int i = 0; i < size; ++i) {
328 for(int k = 0; k < 6; ++k) {
329 int j = k * size + i; // index in the 1D vector
330 pointsMap1[j][0] = 1.0 - xi1[i][k];
331 pointsMap1[j][1] = xi1[i][k] - xi2[i][k];
332 pointsMap1[j][2] = xi2[i][k];
333 pointsMap2[j][0] = 1.0 - eta1[i][k];
334 pointsMap2[j][1] = eta1[i][k] - eta2[i][k];
335 pointsMap2[j][2] = eta2[i][k];
336 w[j] = 4.0 * weights[i] * jac[i][k % 3];
337 }
338 }
339#ifdef DEBUG
340 // Write out five MATLAB-formatted .txt files:
341 writeMatlabMatrixToTxt("x1.txt", "x1_cpp", "x", pointsMap1, 6 * size, 6);
342 writeMatlabMatrixToTxt("y1.txt", "y1_cpp", "y", pointsMap1, 6 * size, 6);
343 writeMatlabMatrixToTxt("z1.txt", "z1_cpp", "z", pointsMap1, 6 * size, 6);
344 writeMatlabMatrixToTxt("x2.txt", "x2_cpp", "x", pointsMap2, 6 * size, 6);
345 writeMatlabMatrixToTxt("y2.txt", "y2_cpp", "y", pointsMap2, 6 * size, 6);
346 writeMatlabMatrixToTxt("z2.txt", "z2_cpp", "z", pointsMap2, 6 * size, 6);
347 writeMatlabVectorToTxt("w.txt", "w_cpp", w, 6);
348#endif
349}
350
357std::vector<int> SingCancellation::getPermutation(int shift) {
358 switch (shift) {
359 case 1: // [x,y] = (x,y)
360 return {0, 1, 2};
361 case 2: // [x,y] = (z,x)
362 return {2, 0, 1};
363 case 3: // [x,y] = (y,z)
364 return {1, 2, 0};
365 case -1: // [x,y] = (x,z)
366 return {0, 2, 1};
367 case -2: // [x,y] = (z,y)
368 return {2, 1, 0};
369 case -3: // [x,y] = (y,x)
370 return {1, 0, 2};
371 default:
372 throw std::invalid_argument("getPermutation: unexpected shift");
373 }
374}
375
376//Dump one barycentric component (x/y/z) as a MATLAB column vector.
377void SingCancellation::writeMatlabMatrixToTxt(
378 const std::string &filename, const std::string &varname, const std::string &component,
379 const std::vector<std::vector<double>> &V, int size, int prec)
380{
381 std::ofstream fout(filename);
382 if(!fout) {
383 std::cerr << "Error: could not open "
384 << filename << " for writing\n";
385 return;
386 }
387
388 int comp = -1; // Default component index
389 if (component == "x") {
390 comp = 0; // x component
391 } else if (component == "y") {
392 comp = 1; // y component
393 } else if (component == "z") {
394 comp = 2; // z component
395 } else if (component != "") {
396 std::cerr << "Error: Invalid component '" << component << "' specified.\n";
397 return;
398 }
399
400 // Start the MATLAB assignment
401 fout << varname << " = [\n"
402 << std::fixed << std::setprecision(prec);
403
404 // Write each row
405 for(int i = 0; i < size; ++i) {
406 fout << V[i][comp] << "; ";
407 }
408 fout << "];\n";
409 fout.close();
410}
411
412//Dump a real vector as a MATLAB column vector.
413void SingCancellation::writeMatlabVectorToTxt(
414 const std::string &filename,
415 const std::string &varname,
416 const std::vector<double> &w,
417 int prec)
418{
419 std::ofstream fout(filename);
420 if (!fout) {
421 std::cerr << "Error: could not open "
422 << filename << " for writing\n";
423 return;
424 }
425
426 // MATLAB assignment
427 fout << varname << " = [\n"
428 << std::fixed << std::setprecision(prec);
429
430 for (double v : w) {
431 fout << v << ";\n";
432 }
433
434 fout << "];\n";
435}

Quadrature point/weight builders for singularity-cancellation on triangles.

void commonVertex()
Build paired quadrature for triangles sharing a single vertex.

std::vector< int > getPermutation(int shift)
Permutation of barycentric components induced by vertex/edge alignment.
